parameters.jsonQuery: ={{ JSON.stringify({ where: [{ type: 'or', value: [{ type: 'equals', attribute: 'status', value: 'Nurture' }] }, { type: 'isNotNull', attribute: 'xDate' }, { type: 'notEquals', attribute: 'status', value: 'DNC' }], select: 'id,name,status,xDate,insuranceInterest,assignedUserId,accountId,contactId,estimatedPremium', orderBy: 'xDate', order: 'asc', maxSize: 200 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ where: [{ type: 'equals', attribute: 'stage', value: 'Closed Lost' }, { type: 'isNotNull', attribute: 'closeDate' }], select: 'id,name,stage,closeDate,lineOfBusiness,assignedUserId,accountId,accountName', orderBy: 'closeDate', order: 'asc', maxSize: 200 }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Closed Lost Opps with X-Date

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'X-Date Alert: ' + $json.name + ' — ' + $json.lineOfBusiness + ' (' + $json.daysUntilXDate + ' days)', status: 'Not Started', priority: 'Urgent', assignedUserId: $json.assignedUserId, accountId: $json.accountId, dateEnd: $json.xDate, description: $json.action + '
Source: ' + $json.source + ' #' + $json.sourceId + '
X-Date: ' + $json.xDate + '
Alert Window: ' + $json.alertDays + ' days (LOB: ' + $json.lineOfBusiness + ')' }) }}

main.node: Fetch Closed Lost Opps with X-Date

meta.notes: Automation B: Daily at 7am, checks Nurture leads and Closed Lost opportunities for approaching X-Dates. Personal lines = 30-day alert window, Commercial = 60-day window. Creates urgent Tasks in EspoCRM. Requires: ESPO_URL env var and EspoCRM API Key credential.
